description: Analyze server response times (TTFB) for https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the Internal HTML data, including response times, to a CSV file in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Generate a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/ttfb_analysis.txt summarizing the total URLs crawled, average response time, the five slowest URLs, identified slow URL patterns, and at least three optimization recommendations.
